name: nvidia_parakeet
title: Nvidia Parakeet
description: NVIDIA's 600M-parameter multilingual ASR model supporting 25 European languages with automatic language detection, punctuation, capitalization, and word-level timestamps

name: qwen
title: Qwen ASR
description: Alibaba's multilingual ASR powered by Qwen3-ASR, supporting language identification and speech recognition for 30 languages and 22 Chinese dialects, with state-of-the-art accuracy among open-source ASR models
